JWT_SECRET.description: JWT signing secret (min 32 characters). Auto-generated if left empty.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: AES-256-GCM encryption key for stored credentials (exactly 32 characters). Auto-generated if left empty.

NEXTAUTH_SECRET.description: NextAuth.js session encryption secret. Auto-generated if left empty.

FRONTEND_URL.description: Public URL of the frontend (e.g. https://your-app.up.railway.app). Update after deploy.

NEXTAUTH_URL.description: NextAuth.js base URL. Same as FRONTEND_URL.

CORS_ORIGIN.description: Allowed CORS origin. Should match the frontend URL.

SERVER_URL.description: Backend server URL for OAuth2 metadata and redirects.

MCP_AUTH_MODE.description: MCP endpoint authentication mode: oauth2, legacy, both, or none.

MCP_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Static bearer token for MCP legacy auth. Only used when MCP_AUTH_MODE is 'legacy' or 'both'.

MCP_API_KEY.description: Static API key for MCP legacy auth. Only used when MCP_AUTH_MODE is 'legacy' or 'both'.

MCP_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE.description: Max MCP requests per minute per client. Requires Redis.

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL for caching and rate limiting (optional). Use ${{redis.REDIS_URL}} if you add a Redis service.

SMTP_HOST.description: SMTP server hostname for sending emails (e.g. smtp.gmail.com).

SMTP_PORT.description: SMTP server port (e.g. 587 for TLS, 465 for SSL).

SMTP_FROM_NAME.description: Sender display name in outgoing emails.

ALLOW_OPEN_REGISTRATION.description: Allow anyone to register an account. When false (default), only the first user can self-register; subsequent users must be invited by an admin.

services.name: postgres
services.description: PostgreSQL 17 — managed database with automatic backups
